programme.title: Los niños del maíz III: cosecha urbana.
programme.desc: En la tercera película de la serie inspirada en el cuento de Stephen King, una pareja sin hijos adopta a dos hermanos huérfanos y se dan cuenta de que los niños son más de lo que parecen.

programme.title: Los niños del maiz: la reunión
programme.desc: En alguna parte de los maizales, se esconde un mal indescriptible, y una lista estudiante de medicina está dispuesta a resolver el misterio detrás de esta plaga siniestra en la cuarta película de la franquicia inspirada en el cuento de Stephen King.

programme.title: Cementerio de mascotas
programme.desc: Para la mayoría de las familias, una mudanza es un nuevo comienzo. Pero para los Creeds será el inicio del fin. Se han mudado al lado del lugar que los niños construyen con sus sueños rotos, el Cementerio de mascotas.

programme.title: Venganza diabólica
programme.desc: Un hombre conjura a un demonio aterrador llamado Pumpkinhead para llevar a cabo su venganza en contra de los adolescentes, quienes sin querer, mataron a su hijo.

programme.title: Más negro que la noche
programme.desc: Cuando Greta hereda la vieja mansión de su excéntrica tía, el único requisito es cuidar del adorado gato de su tía, pero cuando fracasa estrepitosamente en su misión, despierta a los demonios de la casa.

programme.title: Estación zombi
programme.desc: Una desgarradora película de terror y suspenso zombi, que sigue a un grupo de pasajeros aterrorizados que se abren camino a través de un brote viral en todo el país.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Alumno encubierto
programme.desc: Un joven detective se infiltra en una escuela privada de élite para destruir una red internacional dedicada al robo de autos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una Bolsa de Evidencia
programme.desc: Se investiga el asesinato de Jessica Knott, de 9 años. Los investigadores usan una bolsa de basura para conectar al sospechoso James Edward Crow, Jr. con el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mark Fair se fue a trabajar y su prometida, Karla Brown, se quedó en casa. Más tarde, la encontró muerta. Durante la autopsia, se volvieron a examinar las marcas de mordeduras en su cuerpo y la odontología forense identificó al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de un día de pesca en un tranquilo pueblo de Suiza, un adolescente no regresa a casa como se planeó. La investigación revela algunas evidencias microscópicas importantes en el agua cerca de donde fue visto por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 9 años desaparece, la policía y los voluntarios pasan semanas buscándola.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un residente que hacía tiempo vivía en el pequeño pueblo de Lefroy, Tasmania, fue asesinado fuera de su hogar. El robo pareció ser el motivo, pero sin sospechosos, la investigación se detiene.

programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Pet Obsessed Marathon
programme.desc: Featuring ridiculous clips, digital shorts and tons of fluff; these are the internet's most outrageous and outspoken pets... A.K.A. your newest obsession!

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter has a very, very big problem in the shape of one-ton bull Pip. He needs an urgent foot trim but he's reluctant to lie down and allow Peter do his job. One wrong move and Peter could find himself flattened!

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, with the harvest fast approaching, young working dog Ted has fallen ill after running through a field of barley.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian heads to the historic Harewood House near Leeds to check on some goats who are moving to a new enclosure. But catching them isn't going to be easy. In fact, it proves quite painful!

programme.title: World's Ugliest Pets
programme.desc: Picture perfect pugs, cutesy kittens and beautiful baby rabbits - the world is awash with adorable pets. But what about the ugly ones? We celebrate the pets who haven't been blessed with beauty in a brand new, one-off programme

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: A beloved police dog makes the ultimate sacrifice and his actions have a lasting impact on an entire city.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Matt responds to an urgent call from a 16-year-old farmer who's worried about his pregnant ewe. Peter takes Hannah to meet Cyril, a huge bull that needs a pedicure and does not seem at all keen on the idea.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, The Yorkshire Vet, Julian Norton, is called to an emergency down on the farm where semi-retired farmers, The Peckitt’s have a cow suffering from an excruciatingly painful and life-threatening condition, bloat.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Phoebe arrives with two broken legs; Ilana tries working with a horse who is afraid of people.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack
programme.desc: Breeders, Heather and Greg Pendragon are passionate about their plethora of poodles. But their love affair with this canine began with just one - Greg's poodle, named Uther Pendragon.

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: Following the work of Dogs Trust, one of Britain's best-loved dog rescue charities, as they find new homes for unwanted and abandoned dogs.

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: Whacky kittens, an ambidextrous pug, plus a bear gets washed like a car. And in our Top 5, a group of raccoons crash a pool party.

programme.title: My Dog: An Unconditional Love Story
programme.desc: Glenn Close, Richard Gere, Edie Falco, and other stars celebrate the bond with their canine companions in this uplifting documentary about our furry best friends.

programme.title: Going To the Dogs
programme.desc: A dozen breeders and their champion show dogs take part in a major photo shoot for a dog food manufacturer.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Inspector Anthony Joynes arranges a warrant to rescue four dogs from a dangerously overcrowded house.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis receives a note from the late Joseph--he set the fire with the intention of killing her; Claudia is released from the sanitarium; Steven and Blake fight over little Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby physically attacks Alexis, demanding to know the reason Joseph wanted her dead; at the trial for custody of little Danny, Alexis testifies against Blake, who erupts in anger.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Antonio es expulsado a golpes de la fiesta pero se lleva el gran premio: Patricia le confiesa que aún lo ama. Kike y Clara hacen el amor. Teresa Cristina deja la fiesta y va tras Griselda al enterarse que ella hizo los arreglos del Gourmet Palmer.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina insulta a Griselda y la humilla diciéndole que se ilusiona en vano con su marido. Reinaldo visita a Griselda, se disculpa, intenta consolarla, pero acaban despidiéndose para siempre. Bárbara presiona a Máximo para que vuelva a pelear.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara busca el apoyo de Amelia para conquistar a Cristóbal, pero Marisa no se queda muda ante la soberbia de Sara. El senador está muy delicado y la familia teme perderlo. Marisa sorprende a Víctor con Leticia en una habitación del hotel.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Leticia está a punto de caer en los brazos de Víctor. Él se pasa nuevamente de tragos y le suelta a Marisa su secreto. Los negocios de Calixta despiertan sospechas. Ty le pide una promesa a Cristóbal y le aconseja que no renuncie a ser feliz.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal recibe los encargos de su padre a pocas horas de la riesgosa operación. Tito revela que ya tiene medio cuerpo fuera del closet y Sara le saca provecho. Las advertencias de Hugo suben de tono, mientras Marisa descubre lo inesperado.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Crece la tensión, la operación de Ty se alarga más de los esperado. Cristóbal se apoya en Marisa, quien está a punto de renunciar. Estanislao pone a prueba a Calixta y le pide 50 mil dólares para un negocio. Lalo regresa cambiado y cansado.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta se entera que Alicia estuvo en el colegio para acompañar a Felipe y Duván en la entrega de medallas y estalla en reclamos, pero Sebastián no se queda de brazos cruzados.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia acepta la invitación de Sebastián, él le dice lo que siente, pero se confunde por la reacción de ella. Perfecta le pide a Laurentino que averigüe por qué su exnuera quedó en libertad.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián decide asistir a la inauguración del hotel de Briñón, pero no piensa ir solo. Alicia se sorprende al ver a Justino listo para el evento, le dice que no tiene ganas de acompañarlo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia está nerviosa, amenaza a Sebastián con ir al juzgado para recuperar a los gemelos, pero su respuesta debe esperar cuando son interrumpidos. Se arma tremendo escándalo en el bar.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina insulta a Griselda y la humilla diciéndole que se ilusiona en vano con su marido. Reinaldo visita a Griselda, se disculpa, intenta consolarla, pero acaban despidiéndose para siempre. Bárbara presiona a Máximo para que vuelva a pelear.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda sigue en estado depresivo en la cama, cuando aparece Gabriel con la noticia de que ella es la ganadora del premio mayor de la lotería. Teresa Cristina y Reinaldo hacen el amor luego de discutir acaloradamente por Griselda. Él la extraña.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: El boleto ganador no aparece. Teresa Cristina se muere de envidia al saber que Griselda ganó la lotería. Gabriel le propone matrimonio a Carrasco. Bárbara pasa un susto cuando Máximo se desmaya. Reinaldo llama a Griselda, pero ella no le atiende.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Iris le ofrece a Griselda convertirla en una mujer refinada, pero ella la rechaza al descubrir que es tía de su rival. Teresa Cristina se desmaya cuando ve por televisión la noticia del premio. Bárbara planea tomar parte de la fortuna de Griselda.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one moving boat to another. Climb into fishing boat tank filled with dead squid and retrieve weights from the bottom. Contestants shimmy out on a flag pole that is approximately 20 feet from the building, free the flag and shimmy back.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players climb out over the skid and underneath the helicopter. Contestants shoot at target, determining the number of boiled pig rectums they will have to eat. The contestant must navigate around the ledge of a tall building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Playmates Super Bowl Special Part 2

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Player climbs out of a blimp and onto a rope ladder. Contestants bob in plexiglass box of waxworms. To drive a car into a roll.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Climb a rope ladder into a helicopter. To eat the blended concoction you are given. To move flags from the first to the last pole.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To run through a vertical obstacle course. Contestants will put their head inside the box with 24 rats. To cross a plank suspend between to speeding semi-trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Celebrity 2. To move flags from one open window across and around the outside of a building. To separate and move white snakes out of a group of green. To escape from a submerged cage and swim to a life ring.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel. Unhatched duck's embryo boiled 30 minutes and then served. Contestants must ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To gather as many flags as possible. To play a game of pool and eat the assigned items. To run across shipping containers planting flags.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one roof to the other roof. To search for and eat coagulated blood balls hidden in earthworms. To escape from a submerged fuselage.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Clip show of the greatest moments from Season 2.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To unlock the Fear Factor straight-jacket the quickest. To gather the most flags the fastest.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was a tragic twist of fate. Just days after a woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik attempts to brainwash MacHopper, a friend of Sonic's into doing his dirty deeds, but an explosion causes his memory to become unstable.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder into space to pillage the asteroid belt, with Sonic and Tails in pursuit. When the spaceship runs out of power, they are stranded at an abandoned space station, pursued by a residing alien.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik starves a village of rabbits into building a statue of himself. With help from Big Griz and Mad Mike, Sonic and Updike, one of the villagers, manage to infiltrate the statue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik seemingly announces his surrender to Sonic, and he invites him to a resort in his gratitude. Unbeknownst to Sonic, the resort is just another trap created by Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Brandon Quark try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts acquires a magic wand and magical gadgets from Wes Weasley and warns Sonic, and attempts to master them. Meanwhile, Robotnik tries to change Sonic-themed mobium banknotes into Robotnik banknotes in the Mobius Mint.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pursues Breezie and Robotnik Jr. in order to find out why they betrayed him with the intent of building a perpetually loyal robot wife. In a subplot, Junior is in love with Breezie, and enlists Sonic's help in wooing her.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On Sonic's birthday, Tails builds a flying bicycle. Realizing Tails' potential with mechanics, Professor Von Schlemmer invites Tails to be his research assistant.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An intergalactic huntress captures various citizens of Mobius and falls in love with Robotnik during her visit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik unleashes his "Stupidity Ray"on Mobius. As Sonic and Tails make their way to Robotnik's new lair, the Pinball Fortress they find themselves competing with Wes Weasely and Sergeant Doberman.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik threatens to demolish an airport, a lighthouse, and a train station. Sonic is forced to travel to all three places in order to remove the bombs.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik uses his Robo-Matic Machine to construct a pushy robot coach from a football called Coachnik by placing playbooks, game films, strategies, plenty of grit, nerves of steel , and a 300 lb. ham into the Robo-Matic Machine.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic comes to the rescue of a town that is held for ransom by Robotnik's crime syndicate. A few scenes from the pilot animation are integrated into this episode.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A chemical accident caused by Coconuts ends up giving superpowers to Robotnik, who quickly uses them to threaten Mobius's world leaders and publicly humiliate Sonic. However, Robotnik isn't completely invincible.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An asteroid is heading for Turtle Town and Robotnik offers to save it, but only if Sonic agrees to play in the Robolympics against him and his robots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic becomes the sheriff of Tranquil Gulch, in hopes of keeping Robotnik's robots from harassing the locals.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik goes time-traveling to find four Chaos Emeralds that could make him all-powerful. His first stop is the time of Blackbeard the Pirate, where he enlists the pirate's help to find the Emerald of Invisibility.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's next stop in his time-travel is the time of King Arfur and the Knights of the Round Table to get the Emerald of Invincibility. Sonic follows him, but Robotnik, with the unwilling help of local wizard Merlynx, obtains the Emerald.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.desc: Sonic and Tails babysit a trio of unruly baby beavers who end up being abducted by Scratch and Grounder. Robotnik uses the beavers as bait to capture Sonic and Tails, but the beavers become resourceful and help their friends thwart Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.desc: Garfield escapes from the car on a trip to the vet and finds the place where he grew up.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a plot by washing machines to conquer the world. Roy opens a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Garfield Specials
programme.desc: Garfield, Jon, and Odie go to Jon's grandmother's house for Christmas, where Garfield finds a present for Grandma.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon gets a speeding ticket but Garfield suspects foul play. Wade tries some imagining of his own.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon buys a jewel from a phony Swami. Garfield offers the viewers a chance to make story choices with disastrous results.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield is bitten by the video game bug. Orson dreams he’s double-Oh Orson again.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield accidentally brings a baby home from the grocery store. Orson makes up a story to entertain the chicks.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Dr. Bean tries again to use Odie as the basis for robot dogs. Orson dreams he’s Power Pig.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon buys a new TV from Madam Murray. Wade suggests the Roy Rooster Fan Club be changed to the Wade Duck fan club.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield’s and Odie’s minds are switched. Orson tries to read Cinderella.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield gets free pizza. Jon’s new car falls in love with him.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon tries to sell Garfield as a cartoon series. The vegetables Wade is guarding disappear.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Mr. Swindler returns and gets Jon to sell the house for $1. Wade’s forgetful cousin arrives.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield is adopted by an elderly lady. Roy buys a robot that creates weather.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends

programme.title: Garfield Specials
programme.desc: Garfield, Jon, and Odie go to Jon's grandmother's house for Christmas, where Garfield finds a present for Grandma.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon is harassed by a magazine salesman. An escaped saber tooth tiger switches identities with Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon joins a weight-reducing program that offers its own food. When Garfield wishes there were no Mondays.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield is called up before the council. Garfield’s neighbor is being driven crazy by the cat’s antics.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield end up in the ring wrestling the Masked Mauler. Leftovers run rampant in Jon’s refrigerator.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Angel of Death
programme.desc: Behind the facade of a beautiful old Inn, lies the haunting memories of a home that was once part of the Underground Railroad, and the family that helped slaves to freedom.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Overdue For Death
programme.desc: Newly designated as a \\"Literary Landmark,\\" this library is consumed with ghostly visitors with a thirst for knowledge.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Give Me Liberty or Give Me Corpses
programme.desc: The house, formerly owned by the \\"Father of American Surgery,\\" harbors a dark secret deep beneath its floors. Now restless spirits inhabit the home in which they were once the subjects of experiments and research.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunting of the Garde
programme.desc: A 1920's historic theater is rumored to be haunted by one of New London's most prominent whaling families.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dudley Dead Wright
programme.desc: A homeowner's property backs up to land where a cursed 1740's village once stood.Could evil entities have traveled from that property tothis terrified mother's homeputting her family at risk?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Manor of Mystery
programme.desc: A Museum Director and a volunteer are fearful that an upcoming Victorian exhibit about the Victorian Era and Spiritualism will uncover and agitate entities from that time period.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on a mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Queen Aleena advises the Hedgehogs to travel to a valley of Mobius so that they can bring about peace between two contingents of the resistance that have split.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs begin to learn the important lessons of what it takes to be a freedom fighter.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Queen Aleena's royal journals are rumored to be buried under a palace in the city of Tashistan.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs vacation is interrupted by the news of Robotnik's latest weapon.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The history of the Underground is told in detail, from the fall of Mobotropolis to the rise of Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia travels to east Mobius to visit her friend Mindy at the LaTour estate.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik is using the local hairdresser, Doo-bot, to get information on the citizens who are against him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic, and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin a search for the baby's parents.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Oracle advises the Hedgehogs to undertake a mission that could reveal answers about their future.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs converge on the Floating Island, in their latest attempt to find their Mother.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a mission in a distant sector of Robotropolis, the Hedgehogs are informed that freedom fighters have disappeared and are going to be robotisized.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic, and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic, and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A faction of the Freedom Fighters is wiped out by a swarm of metallic fly-bots.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Cyril inherits an Irish castle, where water from the Well of Doon is said to cure all ailments. To preserve the well for the inhabitants of the city, Cyril has to fight against an inheritance claim of rich businessman, Ron Blackard.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: While diving around an old shipwreck, Rip and Samantha have their yacht stolen on the high seas by the modern pirates.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Rip & Co. wing to Japan to investigate reports of a live Oni, the Japanese Demon. They discover that the Oni report is a cover-up for something even more fantastic: the discovery of the magical Daruma Dolls.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Rip has just bought the Hand of Fatima, a legendary good luck totem, from a gypsy, when it's stolen by a young carny who believes its power can save his Family's New Jersey amusement park.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Rip finds in his uncle's diary details of a failed trip to Tibet, searching evidence of the Yeti.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Rip, Sam, and Cyril travel to China, to photograph “Llama's Skull”, an artifact said to protect all those “in his vision”.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When a jar believed to contain anti-aging cream of the Pharaohs is stolen from a Ripley exhibit, the BION team travels to Moscow.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When a young woman collapses in the town square of the Transylvanian town of Poenari, it is discovered she has a vampire bite on her neck!

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When Rip's former girlfriend, Dr. Anderson, steals an Egyptian sarcophagus, hoping to clone an Egyptian Princess inside, the team must fly to Iceland to get it back.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget (Classic)
programme.desc: The two oldest tribes in the Balkan Mountains are waging battle, endangering the entire area. M.A.D. is suspected of triggering the war. Inspector Gadget is on duty to investigate the crime.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget (Classic)
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget foils the evil plans of Waldo, an M.A.D. agent, who is trying to steal Greenfinger's secret formula that enlarges plants.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget (Classic)
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod. Inspector Gadget exposes the criminal and restores order.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra
programme.desc: When the three-headed Death Ghidorah, an even fiercer cousin of King Ghidorah, begins to destroy the forests of Japan, Mothra, one of Godzilla's longtime allies (and sometimes foe), leaves her island paradise to help save them.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra 2
programme.desc: Two young kids inadvertently unleash a giant sea creature which is strengthened from the abundance of modern-day pollution. Mothra's keepers, the tiny twins Moll and Lora, quickly rouse the gentle giant in order to combat this latest threat to peace.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra 3
programme.desc: In the final film in the new 'Mothra' trilogy, King Ghidorah, the most destructive of all the monsters, returns to destroy the Earth. In the end, Mothra is indeed triumphant and takes her place among the greatest of all monsters.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Spacegodzilla
programme.desc: Japan's Counter G Bureau enters the New Age with Project T, in which a telepathic amplifier is implanted in Godzilla's brain to bring the giant monster under control. In a faraway galaxy, the mutant Space Godzilla turns its evil eyes toward earth!

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Destoroyah
programme.desc: With a super-charged blast from his nuclear past, a new Godzilla® emerges from his own ashes, radioactive and ready to take on Tokyo! The great lizard's nuclear energy is increasing by the minute, and a monster meltdown threatens to vaporize the planet.

programme.title: Godzilla Vs. Megaguirus: The G Annihilation Strategy
programme.desc: Five years after Godzilla® terrorized the city of Osaka, Japanese scientists have developed a sure-fire way to finally destroy Japan's monster nemesis. They have created the world's first man-made black hole, which will trap Godzilla® for eternity!

programme.title: Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S.
programme.desc: Mechagodzilla, the superior-armed, state-of-the-art, all-robot version of Godzilla, is undergoing repairs after his devastating battle against the world's monsters.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2011 PGA Championship and multi-time PGA TOUR winner, Keegan Bradley, joins Bones on the course and shares the tips and strategies that have led to his impressive career. Keegan gives unique advice on how he "sees the field" off the tee.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay brings in world-renowned chef Masaharu Morimoto for a demonstration, then challenges the aspiring chefs to recreate his dish to exacting standards.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The thirteen contestants must prepare breakfast for fifty hungry EMTs. The winning team enjoy a poolside lunch and a trip to trapeze school while the losers are on cleaning duty.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay challenges the aspiring chefs to create their own ravioli dishes using ingredients of their choice, then asks both teams to rank their dishes from one to six.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Hell's Kitchen hosts the Beverly Hills High School prom with a theme of "Old Hollywood." The teams must prepare a menu of one appetizer and two entrees.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: To shake things up, Chef Ramsay swaps out members from both teams. For the episode's challenge, each chef must create a unique salad. The team with the most-favored salad wins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The contestants must name the ingredients that are labelled on a spinning roulette wheel. Chef Ramsay then asks them to prepare dishes using the ingredients that they named.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The teams must shop on a budget and prepare elegant dishes for four judges. The winners go sailing and dancing while the losers fumigate Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay tests the contestants' palates by having them taste fast food items disguised as five-star hotel cuisine. He then challenges them to a blind taste test.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: To test their teamwork skills, Chef Ramsay challenges the contestants to cook three appetizers in thirty minutes with only minimal communication in between every dish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Each chef has thirty minutes to create five servings of an amuse-bouche to be judged by five notable Los Angeles chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must serve their signature dish out of a food truck to a group of businesspeople.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Using only their eyesight, their noses and their taste buds, the four remaining chefs must re-create a dish without a recipe.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The chefs must create fusion dishes by mixing cuisines from two different countries. The winner has a dinner date with Chef Ramsay and their family while the losers participate in "moving day".

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The remaining contestants prepare five-course meals that are judged by five L.A. top chefs and food service executives. Who will be offered the head chef position at Los Angeles' L.A. Market?

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacobo descubre que estar de buenas con la Señorita Angustias es aún peor que estar de malas.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacobo teme que una importante misión de espionaje pueda estar en peligro.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Tragón convierte a Llanura Siniestra en un campo de trabajo.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacobo debe decidir si hacer trampas o no hacer trampas contra un archi-rival.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Es el primer día en una escuela nueva y Jacob quiere verse 'en onda'.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic y sus hermanos viajan hasta el desierto de Mobius para reclutar a una tribu de nómades para pelear en la Resistencia.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic y Sonia se infiltran en la guarida de Robotnik para recuperar el libro 'Erizos despeinados'. El libro contiene información valiosa sobre la familia real que podría guiar a Robotnik hasta el escondite de la reina Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Durante una visita a una prisión en busca de registros de su madre, los Hedgehogs se encuentran con un prisionero que lleva una máscara de hierro y dice ser pariente de ellos.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: El oráculo les da una misión a los Hedgehogs para que puedan encontrar respuestas sobre el futuro: los lleva a una dimensión extraña donde Robotnik es bueno y ellos son los malos.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Las vacaciones de Sonic, Manic y Sonia se convierten en una batalla para salvar a Mobius luego de que Robotnik lanza un ataque con su nueva arma: la fortaleza de altitud.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Mientras Phoebe compite en un concurso de canto por TV, el Sr. Gato intenta hackear las máquinas. El Sr. Gato recupera el cohete de Coop, que es un éxito en el club de modelismo, para acceder al observatorio y destruir un satélite que bloquea sus señales.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Millie trae a casa un gato extraño y sin pelo, y Coop descubre que su vida, que era feliz, nunca volverá a ser la misma. Coop desafía a su papá cuando se queda despierto viendo una película de terror y descubre que su casa fue invadida por gatos zombis.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: La Sra. Munson dicta la ley: Coop no debe poner un pie en su patio. Sr. Gato termina con un collar hecho para controlar sus exigentes maullidos.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop y Dennis construyen un fuerte en un árbol para tener algo de tiempo libre de Sr. Gato y de su hermanita. Millie vende un número récord de galletas Greenie Girl pero las cajas siguen desapareciendo y todos los dedos apuntan a Coop.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Después de que Sr. Gato se entera de que le tomaron radiografías en la primera ida al veterinario, se escabulle para destruirlas. El nuevo helicóptero de rescate controlado por radio de Coop le trae recuerdos a su papá de su juguete preferido.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop está muy resfriado y tiene que quedarse a solas en casa con Sr. Gato sin ir a la escuela. Coop y Dennis realizan un espectáculo de magia y hacen desaparecer a Sr. Gato.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: El nuevo ratón a cuerda de Sr. Gato tiene un efecto hipnótico sobre los demás gatos del vecindario. Coop convence a su papá de que es alérgico a Sr. Gato para que él se deshaga del molesto felino para siempre.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Christmas Holiday of My Lifetime
programme.desc: In a very special festive journey through time, Len Goodman is our host of Christmas past as he takes four well-loved famous faces back to their Christmases of yore. He surprises them with the food, decorations, and games.

programme.title: Home Made for the Holidays
programme.desc: Grandparents Rachel and Doug want to make their home a holiday gathering place. Brandie, Ryan and Shannon enhance a classic Christmas theme with personal touches fit for the whole family.

programme.title: Jamie's Best Ever Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie focuses on delicious festive food options like jerk ham and clementine jelly, along with lovely ideas for using up all those inevitable leftovers. It's all you ever wanted to know about Christmas food.

programme.title: Jamie's Family Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie makes the very best roast potatoes and exciting Christmas vegetables, plus experiments with leftover concoctions.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornish Christmas: Special
programme.desc: Home for a while from his worldwide adventures, Rick Stein has a chance to enjoy Christmas in his beloved adopted county, joining in the ancient festival of Wassailing and cooking his own goose.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen (Censored)
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay returns for a fourth season of culinary torture. Fifteen chefs will compete for the chance to work at Ramsay’s own restaurant in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen (Censored)
programme.desc: The season's first challenge finds the contestants slicing halibut into thin six-ounce fillets. One member of each team must serve as maître d' during the dining service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen (Censored)

programme.desc: The two teams compete to make the most pasta for the evening’s dinner service, and a kitchen accident puts one contestant in the hospital.

programme.desc: Kirstie is making a few of her favorite things - like warm woolen mittens, mulled wine, and baked treats for the tree. There are also gingerbread houses.

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas 2015

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.desc: Cobra schemes to use the animals of the world against humanity with a mind-control signal enabling them to make any animal do their bidding, and the device causes Junkyard to turn on the Joes. Can they defeat Cobra and get Junkyard back to normal?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals an experimental nitrogen rocket fuel. But before the Joes can capture the crimson guard in possession of the fuel, he hides it in a greenhouse, where the volatile mixture mutates everything into gigantic man-killing plants.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: The Story of the Rolling Stones
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones are one of the greatest and most influential rock bands of our time having sold in excess of 200 million records worldwide. This fascinating programme tells the story of the early days of the band and how they became The Stones.

programme.title: Mick & Keith

programme.title: Mick Jagger: A Knight to Remember

programme.desc: The Rolling Stones are arguably one of the biggest rock and roll bands of our time, influencing society and music in ways that will never be forgotten.

programme.title: Tom Petty: Fallin' Free

programme.title: Kurt Cobain: About A Son

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: In one of the greatest single-game World Series performances of all-time, Pablo Sandoval gets the Giants off and running with a three-homer game in Game 1 against the Tigers.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game

programme.title: All-Star Highlights

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/90: Danny Jackson, Norm Charlton, and Randy Myers combined to throw a one-hit, one-run gem that helped the Reds clinch the National League pennant against the Pirates.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/1/91: In his third season with the Rangers, at the age of 44, Nolan Ryan took the mound against the Blue Jays and struck out sixteen batters in his path to the seventh no-hitter of his illustrious career.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/13/1991: Kirby Puckett went 3-for-5 with a home run in Game 5 against the Blue Jays to lead the Twins to their third American League Championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: George Brett entered the Royals' series vs. the Angels nursing a shoulder injury. After missing the first two games, Brett gave it a go in Game 3 with four hits separating him from the coveted 3,000. The Hall of Famer went 4-for-5 to reach the milestone.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el quinto ex a la villa y es una gran sorpresa para varios. Spencer se va de cita y cree encontrar el amor. Rocío muestra que su venganza va en serio y coquetea con Ernesto y Oscar. Una maldición parece romperse en la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a reconquistar a su antigua pareja. Renata y Sargento van en serio, mientras que Rocío y Alejandro resuelven sus problemas por un rato. Ernesto sigue tratando de conquistar a Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega otro ex y causa una revolución en la villa. Ernesto le pide a Montse que sea sincera con él y lo respete. Dianey y Elías se van de cita y le rompen el corazón a Spencer, quien encuentra consuelo muy rápido en Norma.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, y Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.
